ProLuxe Travel

Direct contact. By introduction.

Hotels for your principal, their team, and your conferences.

Multi-city itineraries for one. Hotels for the principal plus team. Group programmes at conference scale. One person on point.

From the founder

By introduction. By hand.

A note from Myles ↓

I founded ProLuxe Travel for a small number of principals whose travel cannot afford to fail.

After 20 years on the floor of luxury hotels, the work narrows to two things: who you know, and being there when it matters. By the time your principal arrives, the people at the hotel who matter already know them. The room is as it should be before they ask.

Whether the principal is travelling alone or with twenty, the work lives in ProLuxe Bureau. A live view across hotels and cities for your office, a private link for each attendee. It runs in a principal's office, and across a conference programme.

Where a principal travels with a protection team, the work lives in ProLuxe Bureau. The principal and the team sit on one record, with rooms placed in proximity rather than across the city, because the hotel relationship is at director level rather than central reservations. One point of contact across both halves of the trip. It runs for operations, and for a principal's office.

The shape of the work changes with the principal. The standards do not.

I would be glad to be on hand for your office. If the time finds you, please write.

Write to Myles
For a principal's office EAs and chiefs of staff For a conference programme Event managers and group bookers

With my best regards,

Myles Longfield

Founder, ProLuxe Travel

London, April 2026

myles@proluxetravels.com

+44 20 7088 8291

For your office

EAs, chiefs of staff, and programme managers.

01

A live programme view, not a spreadsheet.

Every booking, every hotel, every change, live in one place. Filter by trip, date, hotel, or status. Your team sees the same view we work from, with KPI counters that animate as bookings move and a per-hotel inventory grid that updates the moment a room is taken.

bureau.proluxetravels.com / autumn-run
127
Confirmed
38
Pending
11
Hotels
Bella
48/58
1 Hotel
22/34
Admiral
40/44

02

Changes flow three ways, not one.

Inline edits where they fit. A change request to ProLuxe when they don't. A clean audit log either way. Every action is logged with who, what, and when, and a Mark Resolved button at our end closes the loop.

bureau.proluxetravels.com / booking / #IBA-204
Resend confirmationInline
Change datesWithin rails
Pass to ProLuxeEscalate

Logged: M. Carter, 09:14, 14 May. Awaiting Resolved.

03

Intelligence layered on top.

Each programme can carry a live Security overwatch tab. Protective intelligence, zone classifications, and pre-event briefs from Colossus, all on the same dashboard your team is already using. Optional add-on, bespoke quote per programme.

bureau.proluxetravels.com / autumn-run / overwatch
Hotel programme Security overwatch
Munich
Zone A
Vienna
Zone A
Amsterdam
Zone B
Edinburgh
Zone A
Colossus
See it live →

For a programme

Event managers, group bookers, and delegates.

01

Delegates confirm in under two minutes.

A personal link, no account, no app. They pick dates, room and preferences and they are done. The link works for the lifetime of the booking window.

mail / inbox
From ProLuxe Travel
Your hotel room for IBA 2026
Dear A. Patel, your personal link below holds your room until 14 August.
Confirm my room →

02

Self-serve edits with rails you set.

Delegates can shift dates within the event window, switch between approved hotels, request a fresh confirmation, all from the same dashboard. Anything outside the rails auto-escalates to ProLuxe with one click and a pre-filled reason.

bureau / booking / amend
Amend booking
14 Sep 2026
17 Sep 2026
Bella Sky · Standard
Outside event window? Pass to ProLuxe
→ Escalate with reason

03

One status view across every delegate.

A live grid: who is confirmed, who is pending, who has amended, who needs a nudge. Filter, search, hover for the audit trail. The view a programme manager opens in the morning to know exactly where they stand.

bureau / iba-2026 / rooming
DelegateHotelDay
A. PatelBella14 / 17
J. Roux1 Hotel14 / 16
M. LinAdmiral15 / 17
S. KowalBella14 / 17
D. OkaforMarriott14 / 15
See it live →

Intelligence, optional add-on

Pre-event briefs, live monitoring, board-ready reports.

For programmes that need it, we work with Colossus Intelligence to ship a protective intelligence cycle alongside the booking work. Threat matrix, zone classifications, pre-event briefs, and live monitoring around the event window. The briefs sit on the same dashboard your team uses, with both the operational and board-ready versions a click away. Scoped and quoted per programme, separate from the standard Bureau engagement.
